caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion. The person on the left, dressed in a white shirt and dark pants, is gesturing with their hands as they speak, indicating an active conversation or explanation. The individual in the center, wearing a black t-shirt and black pants, listens attentively with their hands clasped together. The person on the right, dressed in a gray suit, also appears to be listening and occasionally nods in response. The background includes purple lighting effects and a large screen, suggesting a formal event or presentation setting. A table with a computer motherboard design is visible in front of them, hinting that the discussion might be related to technology or computing.
